raw.title: As global shocks mount, a new report calls for resilient, self-reliant food systems
raw.excerpt: Resilient, self-reliant food systems. A new IPES-Food report says they’re key to addressing food price volatility amid rising geopolitical tensions.

llm_processed.summary: A new report calls for resilient, self-reliant food systems, recognizing the need to reduce dependence on global markets and stabilize food prices in the face of global shocks. This approach prioritizes local food systems and community-led initiatives.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Promoting self-reliant food systems could enable unexpected bridges with local food movements, as well as research on more sustainable and equitable food systems.
